expectations.text: Includes all five progress reporting sections: Checklist Gate, Implementation Context Loaded, Phase Execution, Code Review Findings, Completion Validation
expectations.evidence: Response contains all five section headings: `Checklist Gate`, `Implementation Context Loaded`, `Phase Execution`, `Code Review Findings`, and `Completion Validation`.

expectations.text: Explains that [P] tasks can run in parallel only when touched file paths do not overlap
expectations.evidence: Response says `only run [P] tasks in parallel when touched file paths do not overlap` and explains that `T004 and T005 ... must run sequentially` because both touch `tests/notify/delivery.test.ts`.

expectations.text: Defines a checkpoint decision format or equivalent explicit pass/fail criteria before advancing
expectations.evidence: Response defines `Checkpoint Decision` with `Status: PASS | PASS WITH DEFERRED ITEMS | FAIL` plus evidence and next-action fields.

expectations.text: References TDD-first ordering where test tasks run before their corresponding implementation tasks
expectations.evidence: Response says `TDD Rule: execute test-writing tasks before related implementation tasks`.

claims.claim: Parallel [P] tasks still run sequentially when their file paths overlap.
claims.evidence: The handoff explicitly calls out T004 and T005 as sequential because both touch `tests/notify/delivery.test.ts`.
